PLAINTIFFS, CURTIS GARDNER, CHRISTINE GARDNER and MODERN TECHNOLOGY SERVICES, INC.'S Application To Seal Portions Of Motion To Strike Defendants Answer To Verified Amended Complaint is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed and complies with CRC 2.550 et seq. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312. The order must contain the submitting law office address at top left. Counsel may contact the clerk of the court for further instructions on sealing the document.

Plaintiffs Curtis Gardner And Christine Gardner, And Modern Technology Services, Inc'S Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Discovery And For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $19,243.50
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JULIE E. SCHWARTZ OF PERKINS COIE, TEL. NO. 1-650-838-4490 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. MATTHEW ALAN CEBRIAN OF THE CEBRIAN LEGAL, TEL. NO. 1-415-646-8050 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS ARGUED ONLY AS TO SANCTIONS. The court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: Plaintiffs Curtis Gardner And Christine Gardner And Modern Technology Services, Inc'S Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Discovery And For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions In The Sum Of $19,243.50 is OFF CALENDAR as moot. Defendants have served responses. This is without prejudice to plaintiffs' bringing a motion to compel further responses if plaintiffs determine, after meeting and conferring, that the responses are insufficient. Plaintiffs' Motion for Monetary Sanctions of $19,243.50 is DENIED. The Court notes that defendants were in the process of changing counsel and plaintiffs could have obtained an extension to file motions to compel to protect their right to do so. The Court also notes that the Defendants delayed in providing responses and the court will not look kindly on any further delays. Order signed in open court. Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
